title: Replace YES button celebration with WhatsApp redirect

requirements.summary: Replace the YES button's celebration overlay with a WhatsApp redirect that opens a pre-filled message
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'YES 💍' opens WhatsApp (via wa.me deep link) with the message 'I said YES ❤️' pre-filled and the recipient set to +918810471387.
The full-screen confetti/fireworks/hearts celebration overlay no longer appears when YES is clicked.
All visual styling, hover effects, and animations on the YES button itself remain unchanged.
The 'THINK AGAIN' button still functions as before (cursor-dodging behavior intact).
No other sections or components are affected.

file_operations.description: Remove the full-screen confetti/fireworks/hearts celebration overlay state and rendering logic. Update the YES button's onClick handler to redirect to WhatsApp using the deep link https://wa.me/918810471387?text=I%20said%20YES%20%E2%9D%A4%EF%B8%8F instead of triggering the celebration. Preserve all existing button styling, hover effects, animations, and the THINK AGAIN button's cursor-dodging behavior. Do not modify any other visual elements or layout.
